title: Monitor workplace health and safety processes
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor workplace health and safety processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Provide WHS information to the work group

pcs.text: Identify and explain requirements of health and safety legislation, standards, codes of practice/compliance codes, use of personal protective equipment (PPE), guidance material and safe working procedures and practices to the work group
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain requirements of health and safety legislation, standards, codes of practice/compliance codes, use of personal protective equipment (PPE), guidance material and safe working procedures and practices to the work group?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain requirements of health and safety legislation, standards, codes of practice/compliance codes, use of personal protective equipment (PPE), guidance material and safe working procedures and practices to the work group.

pcs.text: Provide information on workplace policies and procedures to the work group
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information on workplace policies and procedures to the work group?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information on workplace policies and procedures to the work group.
